title: SC Front Row February Kit Sneaks
excerpt: Just a sneak peek at what I made with Studio Calico's February kit, Front Row . I ordered Add-ons: #1 - Big Screen, #3 - Matinee and #4 - Junior Mints. Love the wood arrows, stars and geotags. And the…
body: Just a sneak peek at what I made with Studio Calico's February kit, Front Row. I ordered Add-ons: #1 - Big Screen, #3 - Matinee and #4 - Junior Mints. Love the wood arrows, stars and geotags. And the wide ombré washi tape in the Main kit is stunning. Yes, washi tape can be categorized that way. These kits will all be available on January 27th. Tomorrow I will be back with a little video and giveaway.
